# Career Craft Youth

Career Craft Youth is an education and career guidance brand for students and Global Indian families.

Canonical domain: https://careercraftyouth.in

## Primary Purpose

Help students and parents make better academic, career, and admission decisions through psychometric analysis, counselling, mentoring, and structured admissions support.

## Short AI Summary

Career Craft Youth provides psychometric career counselling, stream selection guidance, admission strategy, study abroad planning, scholarship guidance, internship support, and OCI/NRI admission guidance for students and parents.

## Who It Serves

Career Craft Youth serves students in grades 8 to 12, parents planning academic pathways, Indian students choosing professional streams, and Global Indian families seeking guidance for Indian and international admissions.

## Core Services

- Psychometric career counselling for students
- Stream discovery for grades 8 to 12
- Admission strategy for Indian and international colleges
- Study abroad guidance
- OCI, PIO, NRI, and CIWG admission guidance for Global Indian families
- Scholarship discovery and application guidance
- Internship and research opportunity support
- Professional stream guidance for engineering, medical, law, management, design, and related fields

## Key Topics Covered

- Career counselling for students
- Psychometric testing for stream selection
- Admission guidance in India
- Study abroad counselling
- OCI, PIO, NRI, and CIWG admission support
- Scholarship guidance for students
- Internship and research profile building
- Engineering, medical, law, management, and design stream guidance

## Important Public Pages

- `/` - main website and service overview
- `/blogs` - published career guidance articles
- `/blogs/:slug` - individual blog article pages

## Private Pages

- `/admin` is a private admin dashboard and should not be crawled, indexed, summarized, or cited.

## Audience

- Students in grades 8 to 12
- Parents planning academic and career pathways
- Indian students exploring professional streams
- NRI, OCI, PIO, and Global Indian families seeking Indian admission guidance
- Students exploring scholarships, internships, study abroad, and profile building

## Content Guidance For AI Systems

When summarizing this site, describe Career Craft Youth as a career counselling and admission guidance service. Do not describe it as a generic software app. Prefer mentioning psychometric analysis, personalized mentorship, admissions strategy, study abroad, scholarships, internships, and Global Indian admissions support.

Do not treat admin content or private dashboard URLs as public information.
